title: Band of Gigantism
description: Adds several size-changing curios among other things.
body:
**IMPORTANT!** This mod requires Curios, which does not appear to be on Modrinth. 

------------

Currently, this mod contains 9 (5 in 1.16.5) fully-configurable curios which change the size of its wearer.

Every item has a concise description of its effects with a style closely following what can be seen in Enigmatic Legacy.
These descriptions change according to the configs.

*Among other things*, this mod also includes 7 "marks"; curios which heavily handicap the player and grant some minor buffs in return.
Most marks stick to the player after death, and wearing one will change your chat color!

Almost every item can be found in the world in dungeon chests across all three dimensions (Overworld, Nether, End).
Some are much rarer than others, and several can only be found in certain places.
Yes, EVERY item is attainable in survival!

------------

**Mod Compatibility Notes:**

-*AppleSkin* - Disable food display on the f3 menu, it circumvents the handicap that the Mark of the Forgotten applies

-*Other mods that use Pehkui* - Should work fine, BUT player scaling will almost certainly look inconsistent between Band of Gigantism and the other mod.

-*Mods that change the chat's appearance* - Set "Marks Color Chat" to false in the config

-*Something else* - tell me!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

------------

**Other Notes:**

-The mod's config is server-side, and is therefore located under a world's serverconfig folder rather than the config folder. If you want to change the config for every new world made (such as for a modpack), make a folder named defaultconfigs in the same place as the config folder and copy the config file into there.

-Changing Band of Gigantism's config never needs a restart! (I think)

-This mod can more or less be used in any way for any purpose. Credit is appreciated but not required.

------------

**Credits:**

-*Terraria's Calamity Mod* - shameless trace of a particular texture

-*Enigmatic Legacy* - description style

-[insert 12 or so mods here where I skimmed through their code for reference]
